title: sparganium neglectum subsp. oocarpum
intro: Sparganium neglectum subsp. oocarpum, commonly known as dwarf bur-reed or water spearwort, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Typhaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sparganium neglectum subsp. oocarpum include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support urinary tract health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
